build.description: Build and deploy the Acumatica customization
build.template: Run the build-and-deploy.bat script located at .bat\build-and-deploy.bat. Ask the user which profile (23R2, 24R1, 24R2, 25R1) if not specified.

generate-sql.description: Generate SQL CREATE TABLE script from a DAC file
generate-sql.template: Read the specified DAC file and generate a corresponding SQL CREATE TABLE script following Acumatica conventions. Include CompanyID, all audit fields, primary key, and indexes. Save to ..\..\SCRIPTS\<TableName>.sql.

review-pr.description: Run PR review checklist for Acumatica code
review-pr.template: Read .github\instructions\PR-Review-Guidelines.md and review the current changes (or specified files) against the checklist. Report any violations of naming conventions, missing ATPTEFMMessages strings, hardcoded values, or missing SQL scripts.

cert-check.description: Check code against Acumatica certification guidelines
cert-check.template: Review the code for common certification issues: PX1097, PX1068, PX1066, PX1065, PX1060. Reference the guides in .github\Certification-instructions\ and report any violations.

dac-scaffold.description: Generate a new DAC with full structure
dac-scaffold.template: Create a new Acumatica DAC following the ATPTEFM naming convention. Include: PK class, FK class, all standard fields (RefNbr, BranchID, CustomerID, NoteID), inherit from ATPTEFMAudit, use ATPTEFMMessages for display names, and generate the corresponding SQL script.

workflow-check.description: Validate workflow definition syntax and patterns
workflow-check.template: Review the workflow extension code against Acumatica 2021R1+ workflow framework patterns. Verify state identifiers, flow states, actions, and transitions are correctly defined.
